title: hypericum marahuacanum subsp. compactum
intro: Hypericum marahuacanum subsp. compactum, also known as the compact St. John's Wort, is a shrubby perennial plant native to South America. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The compact St. John's Wort has been found to have various health benefits, including its potential to reduce anxiety and depression, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Hypericum marahuacanum subsp. compactum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infused oils, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
